---
title: "Quote of the day" 
description: "Always acknowledge a fault. This will throw those in authority off their guard and give you an opportunity to commit more. - Mark Twain"
date: 2021-02-25T15:01:00-03:00
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_float:
        collapsed: true
        smooth_scroll: true
    toc_depth: 3
    fig_caption: yes
    code_folding: show
    number_sections: true

fontsize: 14pt
tags: []
comments: false
---


`r emo::ji("sun")` GERTUNC
